concept: Impacto pesado de chão com espigão vertical âmbar, anel achatado, quatro detritos angulares e flash branco.
selectionRationale: Novo perfil de hit para contato pesado: não repete o slash, o cross, as faíscas de colisão ou a quebra de escudo; a silhueta baixa funciona para knockback e pouso na arena.
prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: high-resolution 2D sprite-sheet source for a Bomba PvP hit/impact VFX. Primary request: create a coherent 4x4 storyboard grid with 16 sequential frames of a heavy ground-punch impact: a compact cyan-white impact point touches down, a tall amber vertical shock spike and flattened oval energy ring snap outward, four angular orange debris shards kick up, the peak flashes white, then the ring collapses and the shards fade back to a tiny impact spark. Each cell must contain exactly one centered frame with generous padding and identical framing, crisp readable pixel-art impact silhouette, no text and no UI. Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, no floor, no shadow, no gradient, no texture. Subject: isolated hit effect with a low horizontal ring, vertical spike and sparse angular fragments. Style/medium: crisp high-resolution pixel-art game VFX with limited cyan-blue, amber-orange, white and deep-navy accents, hard readable edges with restrained glow. Composition/framing: square 4x4 grid, row-major temporal order, centered effect in every cell, consistent scale, 16 distinct smoothly progressing frames. Lighting/mood: decisive competitive hit, heavy but clean. Color palette: cyan-white impact point, amber-orange spike and ring, warm orange fragments, navy accents; never use magenta in the subject. Materials/textures: luminous pixel clusters, sharp angular debris and a thin compressed shock ring. Constraints: keep the chroma-key background perfectly uniform; preserve a full transparent-safe margin around every frame; no text, logos, watermark, characters, slash, cross-shaped projectile, shield, smoke, fireball, bomb body or scenery. Avoid: duplicate frames, cut-off fragments, full circular explosion, empty cells, messy dust and inconsistent framing.

source.resolutionNote: A geração entregue pelo image_gen é nativa em 1254x1254; source-upscaled-2048.png é somente um derivado ampliado e não uma fonte nativa 2048px.

pipeline.alphaProcessing: Helper remove_chroma_key.py com auto-key de borda, soft matte, despill e edge-contract 1; depois recorte interno de 40px e extensão transparente centralizada para impedir contato com as bordas.

grok.requestedTask: Conferir a grade 4x4, tentar extrair frames e validar alpha, ordem, timing e bordas internas.
grok.result: Invoke-GrokWorker.ps1 retornou exit code 1 após a mensagem inicial e não criou arquivos.

pipeline.fallback: Extração, atlases, contact sheet, GIF e validação concluídos localmente com ImageMagick após a remoção de halo pelo helper.

validation.visualInspection: Contact sheet inspecionado após a remoção de chroma-key; espigão, anel baixo, detritos, flash e spark final permanecem legíveis sem halo magenta observável.

license: Visual gerado nesta thread; nenhum recurso externo ou pack adotado.
